= Polish Defence Deferred =
===2...b5===
With this move, Black prevents White from playing c4 and prepares his queen's bishop to be fianchettoed.

==Theory table==
{{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}.

'''1.d4 Nf6 2. Nf3 b5'''
